goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should 'include free parking'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '7 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'sunday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 17:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should go to 'kings lynn' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should have a star of 4
The hotel should include free wifi and should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 3 nights starting from sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 17:30 and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to kings lynn and should leave on wednesday
